name: jami-harness
description: Jami Harness docs, roadmap, contracts, runtime, and governance foundation.

scripts.verify: node scripts/docs/check-docs.mjs && node packages/contracts/scripts/generate-contracts.mjs --check && node packages/contracts/scripts/validate-contracts.mjs && node --test packages/policy/test/*.test.mjs && node --test packages/runtime/test/*.test.mjs && node --test packages/artifacts/test/*.test.mjs && node --test packages/observability/test/*.test.mjs && node --test packages/memory/test/*.test.mjs
